top_signals.title: Hormuz Oil Transits Continue Though Attacks Make Owners Wary
top_signals.summary: Ships continued to cross the Strait of Hormuz Monday, though the number broadcasting their passage dropped, as some companies said vessel attacks over the weekend had made them less confident about navigation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Futures Up as Dip Buyers Lift Tech, US-Iran Hostilities Fade
top_signals.summary: Dip buyers emerging to pick up beaten-down technology stocks and easing tensions in the Middle East helped lift US stock-index futures before the bell on Monday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pakistan LNG Seeks Emergency Cargo After Weekend Hormuz Flare-Up
top_signals.summary: Pakistan’s state LNG importer is urgently seeking to procure an LNG cargo for delivery this week, with offers due on June 29, as traffic through the Strait of Hormuz remains volatile amid persistent threats to tankers and reignited U.S.-Iran tensions. Pakistan LNG, the state-owned firm, has issued an “urgent request” for LNG cargo delivery between June 30 and July 4, per a tender document cited by Bloomberg. The Pakistani dependence on Middle Eastern LNG created a major gas supply and power crisis in March and April, when no LNG…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Breez launches Bitcoin-to-stablecoin payments across more than 30 blockchains
top_signals.summary: The new SDK feature lets developers route payments from Bitcoin balances to recipients in USDC and USDT without requiring users to hold stablecoins.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Comcast soars 20% after announcing it will separate NBCUniversal and Sky from cable business
top_signals.summary: Comcast said it will separate into two publicly traded companies through a tax-free spinoff of NBCUniversal and Sky.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: BlackRock’s Aladdin platform adds deeper support for Ethena’s stablecoin products
top_signals.summary: The move makes USDe more accessible to investment professionals wishing to take advantage of 'digital dollar exposure.'
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Kalshi and Polymarket could become M&A targets as prediction markets consolidate: Bernstein
Frank McCourt-backed Professional Jumping League raises £37m from first team sale
top_signals.summary: The Professional Jumping League has raised $50m (£38m) from the first sale of a team in the new showjumping competition backed by former LA Dodgers owner Frank McCourt. The team, which will be one of 16 in the PJL when it launches next year, has been bought by US investor and racing driver Jason McCarthy. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
